actual_current_surface_status: exact negative boundary / reflection plus determinant positivity does not upgrade PR230 to a neutral primitive-cone bridge
conditional_surface_status: If a future same-surface theorem proves neutral-sector irreducibility/primitive positivity improvement, these positivity inputs become useful supporting hypotheses.  They are not the primitive bridge by themselves.
exact_next_action: Do not use reflection/determinant positivity as the PR230 bridge.  Continue through one actual positive object: a same-surface neutral primitive-cone certificate, canonical O_H with C_sH/C_HH rows, same-source W/Z response rows, Schur A/B/C rows, or strict production FH/LSZ plus matching.

parent_statuses.derived_bridge_rank_one: exact negative boundary / derived rank-one bridge not closed on current PR230 surface
parent_statuses.det_positivity_intake: bounded-support / staggered-Wilson determinant positivity is useful positivity-preservation support, not PR230 y_t closure
parent_statuses.full_positive_assembly: open / full positive PR230 closure assembly gate not passed
parent_statuses.neutral_positivity_direct: exact negative boundary / neutral-scalar positivity-improving direct theorem not derived
parent_statuses.primitive_cone_gate: exact-support / neutral-scalar primitive-cone certificate gate; strict irreducibility certificate absent
parent_statuses.primitive_cone_stretch_no_go: exact negative boundary / neutral-scalar primitive-cone stretch no-go on current PR230 surface
parent_statuses.reflection_positivity_lsz_no_go: exact negative boundary / reflection positivity not scalar LSZ closure
parent_statuses.retained_route: open / retained closure not yet reached
parent_statuses.source_sector_transfer: bounded-support / SU3 source-sector pattern is relevant to PR230 as a bridge-computation method, not as source-only y_t closure

proposal_allowed_reason: Reflection positivity and determinant positivity preserve positivity but do not exclude a reducible neutral scalar transfer with source-invisible orthogonal top-coupled directions.

reflection_det_reducible_witness.lesson: Positive spectral measure and positive fermion determinant are compatible with a block-diagonal positive neutral transfer.  The missing theorem is irreducibility/positivity improvement, not positivity preservation.

strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained top-Yukawa closure
does not use H_unit or yt_ward_identity
does not use observed top/Yukawa values or alpha_LM/plaquette/u0 inputs
does not treat positive measure or OS positivity as neutral irreducibility
does not identify source-only C_ss rows with canonical O_H
